trigger_summary: ETH broke $1,880 on 2.8x volume. Liquidation cluster triggered.
context_narrative: This is the setup flagged in this morning's pre-market. Funding was creeping up (+0.067%) and the $22M long liquidation cluster at $1,880 is now being flushed. Forced selling is accelerating the move.
watch_narrative: Next support $1,820. Watch for a volume climax to signal the flush is done. If $1,820 breaks, $1,760 is the next cluster. BTC holding its range so far — if it slips below $67,000 in sympathy, the flush gets uglier.

setups.narrative: If the first cluster didn't absorb all the selling, $1,820 is next. Cascade setups are lower confidence — the first move often exhausts it.
